name: Patient Case
history: Ongoing work-related uncertainty and anxiety. Married recently; the relationship included instances of physical abuse by spouse Ivan and resulted in separation. Both partners are interested in resolving issues and are attending couples therapy.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't resolve the issues, I will be alone.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't handle the uncertainty and conflict.
coping_strategies: Attending couples therapy to resolve relationship issues.
situation: Exposed to clinical terms used to describe the spouse's behavior during therapy sessions.
auto_thought: I am afraid of being hurt again and not being able to fix things.
behavior: Engages in therapy sessions, but feels anxious and uncertain about the outcome.
